name: forge-marketplace
description: Forge — 6-phase development pipeline and project memory for Claude Code

plugins.name: forge
plugins.description: 6-phase development pipeline for Claude Code (unblocker → new-task → refine-idea → plan → critique → execute) with tiered L0/L1/L2 project memory, bash-safety hooks, GitHub sync and the Forge Concise output style. Russian-language triggers, built for non-coders.
